_comment: Parameterised Litmus tier policy. Create ONE policy per tier, substituting <...>. POST to /v1/accounts/<account>/policies with the product relationship set to the Litmus product id. The maxNodes metadata MUST match the tier's max_nodes in automation/licensing/litmus.json, and the resulting policy id goes into both litmus.json (keygen_policy_id) and the worker PRICE_POLICY_MAP_JSON. Per-tier values are tabulated in ADD-LITMUS-RUNBOOK.md.

attributes.name: Litmus <TIER_NAME>
attributes._maxMachines_note: license is bound to the single Litmus install, not to managed nodes
